quin=/kʷin/ from 20th kʷɪn; icuac=/i.kʷak/ from cua=/kwa/, c=/k/; matches poem ɪkuɑk.
w=/ʍ/ from uh=ʍ patterns; e=/e/, ʔ=ʔ direct; similar to ye=Ye but with w.

mɪk from Mɪ; tl=/tl/; aː=/ɑ́/; n=/n/; teː=/teː/ long; kʷ=/kʷ/, i=/i/; extends Mɪtlɑn pattern.
